blockingIssues.description: Broward COUNTY_CONFIGS includes only two endpoints, so VAL-EXPAND-001 (>=3 distinct Broward city ArcGIS endpoints) is not met.
tests/test_broward_expansion.py asserts >=2 distinct hosts, weakening contract requirement (>=3) and allowing false pass against VAL-EXPAND-001.
build_storm_leads_from_candidates routes non-Miami county ZIP scans through fetch_parcels_by_zip, which is backed by a Miami-Dade-only endpoint, so county-targeted storm lead generation is incorrect.
Candidate area specificity is ignored; scans run full county ZIP sets instead of targeted candidate area, leaving VAL-EXPAND-003 incomplete.
App.tsx keeps caseToOpen set after conversion, so syncedSelectedCase always resolves to that case and CaseDrawer cannot be closed normally.
60+d age bucket math uses Infinity in cutoff computation, yielding -Infinity and preventing stale leads from being counted in age distribution.
Directional spacing normalization is incomplete (e.g., NW7th vs NW 7th), so equivalent addresses can hash differently and evade dedup.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit policy that contract thresholds/assertions cannot be weakened in tests (e.g., >=3 to >=2) without orchestrator approval and contract update.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: broward-expansion reduced validation threshold in tests despite VAL-EXPAND-001 requiring >=3 endpoints.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that validation/test verification must avoid real scraper API calls when mission AGENTS requires mocked HTTP, and add a checklist to reconcile skill steps with mission-specific constraints.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: storm-to-lead-pipeline review observed tension between python-backend skill guidance and mission AGENTS external-call constraints.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance to validate computed analytics values with deterministic fixtures/assertions (not only UI presence checks) for chart-heavy features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: conversion-funnel-analytics passed manual UI presence checks but shipped incorrect 60+d bucket computation.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document Broward endpoint discovery matrix in shared library.
Add shared library note that local leads.json may have zero Converted leads and require temporary fixture mutation for conversion-flow testing.
Flag missing skillFeedback block in one worker handoff as a shared-state issue.
Add directional tokenization conventions for dedup to architecture docs.

orchestratorOverrides.lintFailure: Known pre-existing repository issue documented in mission AGENTS.md (eslint binary/config absent). Treated as non-blocking validator noise for scrutiny synthesis.
